title: dactylorchis incarnata var. brevicalcarata
intro: Dactylorchis incarnata var. brevicalcarata, also known as the pink helleborine, is a type of orchid plant species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dactylorchis incarnata var. brevicalcarata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal compounds.
